@Mantia There is literally no benefit to the line of inquiry you are taking. If it was a cop, he had a cool sign. If it wasn’t, it spreads un-needed fear and pushes rightwing talking points about “good protesters” and infiltrators.
It's kinda weird to see a piece that I made myself as one of the references for "inspiration" in a brief.

@Mantia Protesters are people. There is no set behavior for how they behave. Many protesters have very different goals, and for many, those goals include getting their message in front of as many people as possible. No good cops and no bad protesters.
